'''鈭歸-m-sh''' ('''kawamash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zhng|zhng]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zhng|zhng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-m-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawamash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwamash|thiwamash]] || [[word:jiwamash|jiwamash]] || [[word:shiwamash|shiwamash]] || [[word:kiwamash|kiwamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwamash|thuthuwamash]] || [[word:jujuwamash|jujuwamash]] || [[word:shushuwamash|shushuwamash]] || [[word:kukuwamash|kukuwamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwamash|thuwamash]] || [[word:juwamash|juwamash]] || [[word:shuwamash|shuwamash]] || [[word:kuwamash|kuwamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwamash|thuwamash]] || [[word:juwamash|juwamash]] || [[word:shuwamash|shuwamash]] || [[word:kuwamash|kuwamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewamash|thewamash]] || [[word:jewamash|jewamash]] || [[word:shewamash|shewamash]] || [[word:kewamash|kewamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowamash|thothowamash]] || [[word:jojowamash|jojowamash]] || [[word:shoshowamash|shoshowamash]] || [[word:kokowamash|kokowamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowamash|thowamash]] || [[word:jowamash|jowamash]] || [[word:showamash|showamash]] || [[word:kowamash|kowamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowamash|thowamash]] || [[word:jowamash|jowamash]] || [[word:showamash|showamash]] || [[word:kowamash|kowamash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]] || [[word:wamash|wamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wamash|th忙wamash]] || [[word:j忙wamash|j忙wamash]] || [[word:sh忙wamash|sh忙wamash]] || [[word:k忙wamash|k忙wamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawamash|thathawamash]] || [[word:jajawamash|jajawamash]] || [[word:shashawamash|shashawamash]] || [[word:kakawamash|kakawamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawamash|thawamash]] || [[word:jawamash|jawamash]] || [[word:shawamash|shawamash]] || [[word:kawamash|kawamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawamash|thawamash]] || [[word:jawamash|jawamash]] || [[word:shawamash|shawamash]] || [[word:kawamash|kawamash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawamash|shawamash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawamash|goshawamash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawamash|gokishawamash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawamashn眉|shawamashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawamashnkn眉|goshawamashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamashn眉|gokishawamashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawamashsh毛|shawamashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawamashnksh毛|goshawamashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawamashsh毛|gokishawamashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamashro|shawamashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamashnkro|goshawamashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamashro|gokishawamashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamashmu|shawamashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamashnkmu|goshawamashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamashmu|gokishawamashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawamashsher|shawamashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawamashnksher|goshawamashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawamashsher|gokishawamashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawamashng|shawamashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawamashnkng|goshawamashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawamashng|gokishawamashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawamashya|shawamashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawamashnkya|goshawamashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawamashya|gokishawamashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawamashyam|shawamashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawamashnkyam|goshawamashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawamashyam|gokishawamashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamashn眉sh毛|shawamashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamashnkn眉sh毛|goshawamashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamashn眉sh毛|gokishawamashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamashn眉ro|shawamashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamashnkn眉ro|goshawamashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamashn眉ro|gokishawamashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamashn眉mu|shawamashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamashnkn眉mu|goshawamashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamashn眉mu|gokishawamashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamashsh毛n眉|shawamashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamashnksh毛n眉|goshawamashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamashsh毛n眉|gokishawamashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamashsh毛ro|shawamashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamashnksh毛ro|goshawamashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamashsh毛ro|gokishawamashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamashsh毛mu|shawamashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamashnksh毛mu|goshawamashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamashsh毛mu|gokishawamashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamashron眉|shawamashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamashnkron眉|goshawamashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamashron眉|gokishawamashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamashrosh毛|shawamashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamashnkrosh毛|goshawamashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamashrosh毛|gokishawamashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamashromu|shawamashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamashnkromu|goshawamashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamashromu|gokishawamashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamashmun眉|shawamashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamashnkmun眉|goshawamashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamashmun眉|gokishawamashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamashmush毛|shawamashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamashnkmush毛|goshawamashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamashmush毛|gokishawamashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamashmuro|shawamashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamashnkmuro|goshawamashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamashmuro|gokishawamashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
